steps.title: Set up the equations
steps.content:
Translate each statement into an equation.
86% of h equals 43% of j: $$0.86h = 0.43j$$
j is 34% of k: $$j = 0.34k$$

steps.title: Solve for h in terms of k
steps.content:
Since 0.86 = 2 × 0.43, divide both sides of the first equation by 0.43:
$$2h = j$$
Substitute j = 0.34k:
$$2h = 0.34k$$
$$h = 0.17k$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: h = 0.17k means h is 17% of k. 17 is correct.
